text.p: I am here to say the problems of the poor state of road in our local Government that is.

Firstly, Sir our road have not been good for some years ago and I want you to help us on doing good things to our local Government. especially construction of brigde and road in local Government to us. please Sir help us on those prob-lems that we are complaining to your Sir ,

Secondly, I want to tell you more about our poor state of road in our local government and more of that. I want to let you know about the road from to , the road is not good so for that please help us to contruct the road from to .

If there should be a problems about sickeness and we want to take the paitence to hospital you see we cant not get to that place on time, because of the poor road we have in our local Government and we are saying 3 characters that you shoul-d help us on that Sir.

Lastly, I know you can help us on construct our road as the Chariman of local government and if you can help us our community in the villages will be very greatful and if my request will be 1 word accepted I will be granted happy on that.
